sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Inn hong zuan in, Na lungsim gimzo hi;
Na lami mialzo hi, lauhuai lua hilo maw;
A taimang
ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Inn ah (inn ah)
Hong ciah meng in (meng
in)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Inn hong zuan in, hong gal-et lailai ung;
Kongpi ah dingding ung,
Khuamialta
hilo maw;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Inn hong zuan in, mawhsakna dahna
pan;
Mawhna le zumna pan, dawi mangpa khemna pan;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah
in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Inn hong zuan in, An tampi tak om hi;
Vaitutna nuam om hi, kipawlna nuam om
hi;
A taimang ta aw, inn ah hong ciah in.
